title: sideritis × valentina subsp. laderoi
intro: Sideritis × valentina subsp. laderoi is a subspecies of the Sideritis × valentina hybrid, a plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is commonly known as 'Ironwort'. Traditionally, Sideritis × valentina subsp. laderoi has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Sideritis × valentina subsp. laderoi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
